title: zanthoxylum acuminatum subsp. juniperinum
intro: Zanthoxylum acuminatum subsp. juniperinum, also known as Korean prickly ash, is a plant species belonging to the Rutaceae family, characterized by its distinctive spiny branches and aromatic leaves. The medicinal properties of Zanthoxylum acuminatum subsp. juniperinum include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to the presence of compounds such as limonoids and alkaloids. This plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, and is also believed to have anti-cancer and anti-diabetic properties. The herbal preparations of Zanthoxylum acuminatum subsp. juniperinum include decoctions, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and topical creams for medicinal purposes.
